title: Delissea pilosa
intro: Delissea pilosa, also known as hairy delissea or alpine hairy delissea, is a plant species belonging to the family Goodeniaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Hawaii. The health benefits of Delissea pilosa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Delissea pilosa is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
